if(USE_SYSTEM_WOLFSSL)
	message(STATUS "RPCS3: using shared wolfssl")
	pkg_check_modules(WolfSSL REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET wolfssl>=4.7.0)
	add_library(wolfssl INTERFACE)
	target_link_libraries(wolfssl INTERFACE PkgConfig::WolfSSL)
else()
	set(WOLFSSL_TLS13 OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable wolfSSL TLS v1.3 (default: enabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_SHA3 ON CACHE BOOL "Enable wolfSSL SHA-3 support (default: enabled on x86_64/aarch64)")
	set(WOLFSSL_SHAKE256 ON CACHE BOOL "Enable wolfSSL SHAKE256 support (default: enabled on x86_64/aarch64)")
	set(WOLFSSL_BASE64_ENCODE OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Base64 encoding (default: enabled on x86_64)")
	set(WOLFSSL_DES3 ON CACHE BOOL "Enable DES3 (default: disabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_PWDBASED ON CACHE BOOL "Enable PWDBASED (default: disabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_FAST_MATH ON CACHE BOOL "Enable fast math ops (default: disabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable examples (default: enabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_CRYPT_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Crypt Bench/Test (default: enabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_ASYNC_THREADS OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Asynchronous Threading (default: enabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_BUILD_OUT_OF_TREE ON CACHE BOOL "Don't generate files in the source tree (default: no)")
	set(WOLFSSL_SNI ON CACHE BOOL "Enable SNI (default: disabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_OPENSSLEXTRA ON CACHE BOOL "Enable extra OpenSSL API, size+ (default: disabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_HARDEN OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable Hardened build, Enables Timing Resistance and Blinding (default: enabled)")
	set(WOLFSSL_ALT_CERT_CHAINS ON CACHE BOOL "Enable support for Alternate certification chains (default: disabled)")

	add_subdirectory(wolfssl EXCLUDE_FROM_ALL)

	target_compile_definitions(wolfssl PUBLIC WOLFSSL_DES_ECB HAVE_WRITE_DUP)
	target_compile_definitions(wolfssl PUBLIC FP_MAX_BITS=8192)
endif()
